home.hero_desc: Stop overpaying for antiques. Get instant commercial analysis, risk detection, and negotiation strategy.
home.tip_joints_desc: Look for dovetails. Machine-cut vs hand-cut tells the era. Irregularity is your friend.
home.tip_glass_desc: Authentic wear should be on the base, not the sides. Look for 'pontil' marks.
home.tip_veneer_desc: Check the edges. Thick veneer (1-2mm) usually means pre-1850. Paper-thin is modern.
home.tip_hardware_desc: Look behind the handles. Extra holes suggest the hardware was replaced, affecting value.
home.tip_smell_desc: Old wood has a distinct, musty but not rotten smell. New stains smell like chemicals.

analysis.title: Dealer's Assessment

analysis.disclaimer: AI analysis is probabilistic. Always verify in person before purchasing.
